# gcore_cloud_inference_registry_credential (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gcore_cloud_inference_registry_credential" "example_cloud_inference_registry_credential" {
  project_id = 1
  name = "docker-io"
  password = "password"
  registry_url = "registry.example.com"
  username = "username"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `name` (String) Registry credential name.
- `password_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Registry password.
- `password_wo_version` (Number) Registry credential password write-only version. Used to trigger updates of the write-only password field.
- `registry_url` (String) Registry URL.
- `username` (String) Registry username.

### Optional

- `project_id` (Number) Project ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Registry credential name.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import gcore_cloud_inference_registry_credential.example '<project_id>/<credential_name>'
```
